syntax_3555.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3555.title: Hologram Height
syntax_3555.description: Returns the physical height of a hologram.

en: Returns the physical height of a hologram.

syntax_3534.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3534.title: Hologram Allows Placeholders
syntax_3534.description: Checks whether the given hologram allows placeholders.
syntax_3534.syntax_pattern:
[holo[gram][s]] %holograms% (allow|disallow)[s] placeholders
placeholders (in|for) [holo[gram][s]] %holograms% are (enabled|disabled)
[holo[gram][s]] %holograms% (doesn't|does not|don't|do not) (allow|disallow) placeholders
placeholders (in|for) [holo[gram][s]] %holograms% (aren't|are not) (enabled|disabled)

en: Checks whether the given hologram allows placeholders.

syntax_3535.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3535.title: Is Following Hologram
syntax_3535.description: Checks whether the given hologram is a following hologram.

en: Checks whether the given hologram is a following hologram.

syntax_3536.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3536.title: Is Hologram Deleted
syntax_3536.description: Checks whether the given hologram is deleted. When you delete a hologram that is stored in a variable, the hologram object will still exist in the variable but will not be usable. This condition exists to check this case.

en: Checks whether the given hologram is deleted. When you delete a hologram that is stored in a variable, the hologram object will still exist in the variable but will not be usable. This condition exists to check this case.

syntax_3532.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3532.title: On Hologram Line Touch
syntax_3532.description: Called while a player is trying to pickup an item in a hologram line. See the `Make Hologram Line Touchable` effect.

en: Called while a player is trying to pickup an item in a hologram line. See the `Make Hologram Line Touchable` effect.

syntax_3531.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3531.title: On Hologram Line Click
syntax_3531.description: Called when a player clicks on a hologram line. See the `Make Hologram Line Click-able` effect.

en: Called when a player clicks on a hologram line. See the `Make Hologram Line Click-able` effect.

syntax_3553.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3553.title: Following Holograms of Entity
syntax_3553.description: Returns the following holograms of an entity. Use the `Following Hologram` effect to make an exiting hologram start/stop following an entity.

en: Returns the following holograms of an entity. Use the `Following Hologram` effect to make an exiting hologram start/stop following an entity.

syntax_3547.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3547.title: Hologram Visibility
syntax_3547.description: Changes visibility of a hologram for the given players or makes a hologram invisible/visible by default. Resetting hologram visibility means setting the visibility to the default value (visible if not changed).
syntax_3547.syntax_pattern:
hide [holo[gram][s]] %holograms% (from|for) %players%
reveal [holo[gram][s]] %holograms% (to|for|from) %players%
reset [the] visibilit(y|ies) of [holo[gram][s]] %holograms% [for %players%]
(make|let) [holo[gram][s]] %holograms% (invisible|hidden) by default
(make|let) [holo[gram][s]] %holograms% visible by default

en: Changes visibility of a hologram for the given players or makes a hologram invisible/visible by default. Resetting hologram visibility means setting the visibility to the default value (visible if not changed).

syntax_3543.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3543.title: Allow Placeholders in Hologram
syntax_3543.description: Allows/disallows placeholders in a hologram. Disallowed by default.

en: Allows/disallows placeholders in a hologram. Disallowed by default.

syntax_3537.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3537.title: Is Hologram Entity
syntax_3537.description: Checks whether the given entity is a part of a hologram. It is not possible to get the hologram.
syntax_3537.syntax_pattern:
%entities% (is|are) [[a] part[s] of] [a] holo[gram] [entit(y|ies)]
%entities% (isn't|is not|aren't|are not) [[a] part[s] of] [a] holo[gram] [entit(y|ies)]

en: Checks whether the given entity is a part of a hologram. It is not possible to get the hologram.

syntax_3538.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3538.title: Is Hologram Line Click-able
syntax_3538.description: Checks whether the given hologram line is click-able.

en: Checks whether the given hologram line is click-able.

syntax_3539.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3539.title: Is Hologram Line Touchable
syntax_3539.description: Checks whether the given hologram line is touchable.

en: Checks whether the given hologram line is touchable.

syntax_3540.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3540.title: Is Hologram Visible by Default
syntax_3540.description: Checks whether the given hologram is visible by default.
syntax_3540.syntax_pattern:
[holo[gram][s]] %holograms% (is|are) (visible|(invisible|hidden)) by default
[holo[gram][s]] %holograms% (isn't|is not|aren't|are not) (visible|(invisible|hidden)) by default

en: Checks whether the given hologram is visible by default.

syntax_3541.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3541.title: Is Text/Item Line
syntax_3541.description: Checks whether the given hologram line is a text line or an item line. The `Hologram Line Content` expression can be used to get the text or the item.
syntax_3541.syntax_pattern:
[holo[gram] line[s]] %hologramlines% (is|are) [a[n]] ((text|string)|item) line[s]
[holo[gram] line[s]] %hologramlines% (isn't|is not|aren't|are not) [a[n]] ((text|string)|item) line[s]

en: Checks whether the given hologram line is a text line or an item line. The `Hologram Line Content` expression can be used to get the text or the item.

syntax_3542.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3542.title: Add Hologram Line
syntax_3542.description: Adds new lines to a hologram. `insert` means adding after the specified line and moving the next lines below.
syntax_3542.syntax_pattern:
append [((click|touch|interact)[-]able|interactive)] [line[s]] %strings/itemtypes% to [holo[gram][s]] %holograms%
prepend [((click|touch|interact)[-]able|interactive)] [line[s]] %strings/itemtypes% to [holo[gram][s]] %holograms%
insert [((click|touch|interact)[-]able|interactive)] [line[s]] %strings/itemtypes% in[to] [holo[gram][s]] %holograms% at line %number%
insert [((click|touch|interact)[-]able|interactive)] [line[s]] %strings/itemtypes% in[to] [holo[gram][s]] %holograms% at [the] %number%(st|nd|rd|th) line

en: Adds new lines to a hologram. `insert` means adding after the specified line and moving the next lines below.

syntax_3545.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3545.title: Delete Hologram
syntax_3545.description:
Deletes a hologram. The hologram type has the delete changer already, but this effect exists for variables. For example `delete {_holo}` would delete the variable but you can use `delete hologram {_holo}` to avoid that.

When you delete a hologram that is stored in a variable, the hologram object will still exist in the variable but will not be usable. You should delete the variable too in this case.

en:
Deletes a hologram. The hologram type has the delete changer already, but this effect exists for variables. For example `delete {_holo}` would delete the variable but you can use `delete hologram {_holo}` to avoid that.

When you delete a hologram that is stored in a variable, the hologram object will still exist in the variable but will not be usable. You should delete the variable too in this case.

syntax_3546.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3546.title: Following Hologram
syntax_3546.description: Makes a hologram start/stop following an entity.

en: Makes a hologram start/stop following an entity.

syntax_3549.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3549.title: Teleport Hologram
syntax_3549.description: Teleports a hologram to a specific location.

en: Teleports a hologram to a specific location.

syntax_3550.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3550.title: All Holograms
syntax_3550.description: Returns all the holograms created by skript-holo or other plugins *except HolographicDisplays*.

en: Returns all the holograms created by skript-holo or other plugins *except HolographicDisplays*.

syntax_3551.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3551.title: Followed Entity of Hologram
syntax_3551.description: Returns the followed entity of a hologram. Use the `Following Hologram` effect to make an exiting hologram start/stop following an entity.

en: Returns the followed entity of a hologram. Use the `Following Hologram` effect to make an exiting hologram start/stop following an entity.

syntax_3552.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3552.title: Following Hologram Offset
syntax_3552.description: Returns offset (directions) of a following hologram. Can be set.

en: Returns offset (directions) of a following hologram. Can be set.

syntax_3554.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3554.title: Hologram Creation Date
syntax_3554.description: Returns the creation date of a hologram.

en: Returns the creation date of a hologram.

syntax_3562.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3562.title: Hologram Line
syntax_3562.description:
A line of a HolographicDisplays hologram. Can be deleted using the 'delete/clear' changer.

Has converters to `text`, `item type` and `number`. Converters mean that you can use this type like the converted types. For example you can do `give line 1 of hologram to player` and `if event-hologram-line is 5:`, but please note that getting line number of a hologram line will check every line of the hologram. You shouldn't make systems that relies on line numbers, but contents.

en:
A line of a HolographicDisplays hologram. Can be deleted using the 'delete/clear' changer.

Has converters to `text`, `item type` and `number`. Converters mean that you can use this type like the converted types. For example you can do `give line 1 of hologram to player` and `if event-hologram-line is 5:`, but please note that getting line number of a hologram line will check every line of the hologram. You shouldn't make systems that relies on line numbers, but contents.

syntax_3560.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3560.title: Parent Hologram of Hologram Line
syntax_3560.description: Returns the parent hologram of a hologram line.

en: Returns the parent hologram of a hologram line.

syntax_3533.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3533.title: Can See Hologram
syntax_3533.description: Checks whether the given players can see the given holograms. Use the `Hologram Visibility` effect to hide/show holograms.
syntax_3533.syntax_pattern:
[holo[gram][s]] %holograms% (is|are) (visible|(invisible|hidden)) (for|to|from) %players%
%players% can see [holo[gram][s]] %holograms%
[holo[gram][s]] %holograms% (is|are)(n't| not) (visible|(invisible|hidden)) (for|to|from) %players%
%players% can('t| not) see [holo[gram][s]] %holograms%

en: Checks whether the given players can see the given holograms. Use the `Hologram Visibility` effect to hide/show holograms.

syntax_3544.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3544.title: Create Hologram
syntax_3544.description:
Creates a new hologram.

Besides the `store in %variable%`, the `Last Created Hologram` expression can be used to get the created hologram.
syntax_3544.syntax_pattern:
(create|spawn) [a] [new] holo[gram] [with [((click|touch|interact)[-]able|interactive)] line[s] %strings/itemtypes%] [%direction% %location%] [and store [it] in [[the] variable] %objects%]
(create|spawn) [a] [new] holo[gram] [with [((click|touch|interact)[-]able|interactive)] line[s] %strings/itemtypes%] that follows %entity% [[with] offset [(of|by|in|to)] [[the] direction] %directions%] [and store [it] in [[the] variable] %objects%]

en:
Creates a new hologram.

Besides the `store in %variable%`, the `Last Created Hologram` expression can be used to get the created hologram.

syntax_3548.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3548.title: Make Hologram Line Click-able/Touchable
syntax_3548.description:
Makes a hologram line click-able or/and touchable. 

- **Click-able:** when a player clicks on the line, the `Hologram Line Click` event will be triggered
- **Touchable:** when a player tries to pickup the item in the line, the `Hologram Line Touch` event will be triggered
- **Interactive:** includes both click-able and touchable

en:
Makes a hologram line click-able or/and touchable. 

- **Click-able:** when a player clicks on the line, the `Hologram Line Click` event will be triggered
- **Touchable:** when a player tries to pickup the item in the line, the `Hologram Line Touch` event will be triggered
- **Interactive:** includes both click-able and touchable

syntax_3556.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3556.title: Hologram Line Content
syntax_3556.description: Returns content (text or item) of a hologram line. Please note that there are hologram line to text and item converters so you can use a hologram line like a text or an item (e.g. give first line of holo to player)

en: Returns content (text or item) of a hologram line. Please note that there are hologram line to text and item converters so you can use a hologram line like a text or an item (e.g. give first line of holo to player)

syntax_3557.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3557.title: Hologram Line Number
syntax_3557.description: Returns the number of a hologram line. But please note that getting line number of a hologram line will check every line of the hologram. You shouldn't make systems that relies on line numbers, but contents.
syntax_3557.syntax_pattern:
[the] line number[s] of [holo[gram] line[s]] %hologramlines%
%hologramlines%'[s] line number[s]

en: Returns the number of a hologram line. But please note that getting line number of a hologram line will check every line of the hologram. You shouldn't make systems that relies on line numbers, but contents.

syntax_3558.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3558.title: Hologram Lines
syntax_3558.description:
Returns lines of a hologram. Can be changed, removing a text or an item means it will search lines that match exactly with the input and remove them.

It is possible to create new lines using the `set` changer, for example if the hologram has 3 lines and you set line 5, the line 4 will be blank.
syntax_3558.syntax_pattern:
[all] [the] lines of [holo[gram][s]] %holograms%
%holograms%'[s] [all] lines
[the] line %number% of [holo[gram][s]] %holograms%
[the] %number%(st|nd|rd|th) line[s] of [holo[gram][s]] %holograms%
[the] (first|last) line[s] of [holo[gram][s]] %holograms%

en:
Returns lines of a hologram. Can be changed, removing a text or an item means it will search lines that match exactly with the input and remove them.

It is possible to create new lines using the `set` changer, for example if the hologram has 3 lines and you set line 5, the line 4 will be blank.

syntax_3559.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3559.title: Last Created Hologram
syntax_3559.description:
Holds the hologram that was created most recently with the `Create Hologram` effect.
Can be deleted using the `delete/clear` changer which means the hologram will be removed from the world and this expression will be empty.

en:
Holds the hologram that was created most recently with the `Create Hologram` effect.
Can be deleted using the `delete/clear` changer which means the hologram will be removed from the world and this expression will be empty.

syntax_3561.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3561.title: Hologram
syntax_3561.description: A HolographicDisplays hologram. Can be deleted using the `delete/clear` changer or can be reset using the `reset` changer. When you delete a hologram that is stored in a variable, the hologram object will still exist in the variable but will not be usable. You should delete the variable too in this case.

en: A HolographicDisplays hologram. Can be deleted using the `delete/clear` changer or can be reset using the `reset` changer. When you delete a hologram that is stored in a variable, the hologram object will still exist in the variable but will not be usable. You should delete the variable too in this case.
